items.title: Solana Ecosystem Roundup: May 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: Recent developments in the Solana ecosystem highlight key projects and partnerships that could enhance SOL's utility and adoption.

items.title: Hyperliquid briefly flips Solana in price: Is market cap next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Hyperliquid's temporary price surge over Solana raises questions about market cap dynamics and competitive positioning within the decentralized finance space.

items.title: Crypto's worst week since July 2024 deepens as bitcoin, ether near critical price levels
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant downturn in crypto markets, with major assets nearing critical support levels, could impact liquidity and investor sentiment towards SOL.
